mapper.insert: insert into biz_order_rating (order_id, rater_id, executor_id, score, comment, create_time) values (#{orderId}, #{raterId}, #{executorId}, #{score}, #{comment}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
select r.rating_id, r.order_id, r.rater_id, r.executor_id, r.score, r.comment, r.create_time, o.order_no, o.title as order_title, c.nick_name as rater_name, e.nick_name as executor_name from biz_order_rating r inner join biz_order o on r.order_id = o.order_id left join sys_user c on r.rater_id = c.user_id left join sys_user e on r.executor_id = e.user_id
and o.order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
and o.title like concat('%', #{orderTitle}, '%')
and r.score = #{score}
and e.nick_name like concat('%', #{executorName}, '%')
order by r.create_time desc
